bookings.itinerary: Auckland to Tokyo, Air New Zealand

visa_requirements.details: New Zealand citizens can enter Japan visa-free for up to 90 days for tourism. A passport with at least 6 months validity beyond return and a return ticket are required.
visa_requirements.disclaimer: Please verify with the official government website or safetravel.govt.nz before travel.

visa_requirements.details: New Zealand citizens receive a visa-free visitor permit for up to 4 months on arrival in Fiji.
visa_requirements.disclaimer: Please verify with the official government website or safetravel.govt.nz before travel.

visa_requirements.details: New Zealand citizens require a visa on arrival (VOA) for tourism in Indonesia, valid for 30 days and extendable once.
visa_requirements.disclaimer: Please verify with the official government website or safetravel.govt.nz before travel.

destination_tips.weather: Warm and humid early September, cooling toward late month; occasional typhoons.
destination_tips.currency: Japanese Yen (JPY). Cash is still widely used; carry some.
destination_tips.safety: Very safe. Carry your passport as ID is occasionally requested.
destination_tips.tips: Get a Suica or Pasmo card for easy city transport.

destination_tips.weather: Dry season - warm sunny days around 26C, cooler evenings.
destination_tips.currency: Fijian Dollar (FJD). Tipping is not expected.
destination_tips.safety: Very safe in resort areas; respect village customs and dress.
destination_tips.tips: Pack reef-safe sunscreen and a light layer for evenings.
